name: B.E.F. Zelos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>要</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>塞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ゼロス
desc: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "Boss Rush" from your Deck to your hand. "B.E.S." monsters you control gain 500 ATK/DEF, your opponent cannot target them with card effects, also they cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. Once per turn: You can Special Summon 1 "B.E.S." monster from your hand. If a "B.E.S." monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned to your field: Place 1 counter on it.
eff: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "Boss Rush" from your Deck to your hand. "B.E.S." monsters you control gain 500 ATK/DEF, your opponent cannot target them with card effects, also they cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. Once per turn: You can Special Summon 1 "B.E.S." monster from your hand. If a "B.E.S." monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned to your field: Place 1 counter on it.

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
